pattern "//Iris";

ruleset iris supervised
{
	// Generated by DARL rule induction.
	// Train correct:  94.08% on 152 patterns.
	// Percentage of unknown responses over all patterns: 0.00
	input numeric petal_length { {very_small, -Infinity,1,1.5},{small, 1,1.5,3},{quite_small, 1.5,3,4.4},{medium, 3,4.4,4.9},{quite_large, 4.4,4.9,5.6},{large, 4.9,5.6,6.9},{very_large, 5.6,6.9,Infinity}};
	input numeric petal_width { {very_small, -Infinity,0.1,0.2},{small, 0.1,0.2,1},{quite_small, 0.2,1,1.3},{medium, 1,1.3,1.6},{quite_large, 1.3,1.6,2},{large, 1.6,2,2.5},{very_large, 2,2.5,Infinity}};
	input numeric sepal_length { {very_small, -Infinity,4.3,5},{small, 4.3,5,5.4},{quite_small, 5,5.4,5.8},{medium, 5.4,5.8,6.3},{quite_large, 5.8,6.3,6.7},{large, 6.3,6.7,7.9},{very_large, 6.7,7.9,Infinity}};
	input numeric sepal_width { {very_small, -Infinity,2,2.7},{small, 2,2.7,2.9},{quite_small, 2.7,2.9,3},{medium, 2.9,3,3.2},{quite_large, 3,3.2,3.4},{large, 3.2,3.4,4.4},{very_large, 3.4,4.4,Infinity}};

	output categorical class {"Iris-setosa","Iris-versicolor","Iris-virginica"};

	if petal_length is very_small  then class will be "Iris-setosa" confidence 1; // examples: 4
	if petal_length is small  then class will be "Iris-setosa" confidence 1; // examples: 46
	if petal_length is quite_small  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 6
	if petal_length is medium  and sepal_length is small  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 1
	if petal_length is medium  and sepal_length is quite_small  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 5
	if petal_length is medium  and sepal_length is medium  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 11
	if petal_length is medium  and sepal_length is quite_large  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 7
	if petal_length is medium  and sepal_length is large  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 3
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is medium  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 4
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is quite_large  and sepal_width is very_small  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 1
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is quite_large  and sepal_width is small  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 2
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is quite_large  and sepal_width is medium  then class will be "Iris-versicolor" confidence 1; // examples: 1
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is large  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 7
	if petal_length is quite_large  and petal_width is very_large  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 3
	if petal_length is large  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 27
	if petal_length is very_large  then class will be "Iris-virginica" confidence 1; // examples: 6


}
 
mapinput petal_length "petal_length";
mapinput petal_width "petal_width";	
mapinput sepal_length "sepal_length";
mapinput sepal_width "sepal_width";

mapoutput class "class";

wire petal_length iris.petal_length;
wire petal_width iris.petal_width;
wire sepal_length iris.sepal_length;
wire sepal_width iris.sepal_width;
wire iris.class class;
